name: dclamp997_steps500
hypothesis: exp006 implicated slow state-accumulation as the divergence cause; decay_clamp is the fast-track forgetting floor that bounds retained state, but it was only ever tested confounded with high LR (exp003, 4e-4->diverged). Lowering decay_clamp 0.999->0.997 at the STABLE lr 2.5e-4 isolates whether the fast-track floor controls the late divergence independently, and tests whether a tighter state bound lets retrieval escape the format plateau the way slow_decay 0.90 (slow-track) did not.
